title: Verify existing implementation of breadcrumb component
description: The Breadcrumb component already exists at src/components/ui/breadcrumb.tsx with full implementation: props interface with items array, active last-item rendering as span, links for other items, separators, aria-label accessibility, and CSS module styling. Associated unit tests at src/components/ui/breadcrumb.test.tsx pass all 6 tests covering link rendering, active item handling, single item case, items without href, nav accessibility, and separators.
existing_patterns: src/components/ui/breadcrumb.tsx: React functional component with typed props interface and CSS module styling
src/components/ui/breadcrumb.test.tsx: vitest + @testing-library/react test patterns with render and screen queries
src/components/ui/breadcrumb.module.css: CSS module with scoped class names for breadcrumb styling
